texto: I know I should be reassuring him that everything's all right, that he needn't worry, but I can't. Instead I'm talking to someone I don't know who isn't even there. Thank you, I'm saying. Thank you for Lucy, thank you for Claire and for Daniel, thank you for this cold and this blood and this pain. Thank you. Thank you. Thank you.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Michael Dibdin sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “I know I should be reassuring him that everything's all right, that he needn't worry, but I can't…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a gratidao, gratitude, reflexao, útil em momentos de reflexao.
